{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302523732A30D9257B98939497D"}"},"total":389},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494958798578189081","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪堪，我觉得写的非常细致，本人高一，也搞过竞赛，非常有代入感，而且真的非常戳我爽点，不管是剧情还是男女主的感情线都非常nice"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745060990,"group_id":"7366506548035603480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NycFRseVtW1pfMX8Vf5HIEjkKsUoNjrdtxRAyYO+CI19","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2412762895498840","user_name":"啊666学渣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2412762895498840","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366506548035603480","book_info":{"abstract":"[单女主]+[校园生活]+[恋爱日常]+[学渣逆袭]+[玩梗]+[救赎]+[轻松搞笑]
.
001~165章 高中生活
165~330章 竞赛兼校园
330~435章 大学日常
436~540章 可控核聚变
.
该书融合了校园、青春、系统、学霸、恋爱、重生等元素。
校园日常慢生活，恋爱、系统（纯学习）双线发展。
.
什么是青春？
微风，树荫，阳光，蝉鸣，课间，教室，相遇，背影，盛夏，侧脸，走廊，对视，闪躲，操场，心动，暗恋，晚霞，三年
.
事实胜雄辩，理论出真知。
感受着手中那抹细腻的触感，陈景航不由得轻叹一声。
欺霜赛雪，肤若凝脂，古人诚不我欺。
果然，女人都是用水做的。
“是弹性形变。”
“你还！”
梅开二度，没完没了了是吧？
徐沐歆羞恼地瞪了他一眼，“不准再掐我的脸了！”
“好的好的。”
……光说不做，你倒是把手收回去啊！
徐沐歆委屈地撅了撅嘴，却丝毫不敢反抗。
她只好眼巴巴地看着某人，忍气吞声。
呜呜呜，又被欺负了。
.
成绩需要一点点进步，感情需要一点点培养。
不会无脑白给，不会莫名打脸装逼。
有大情节必有伏笔，有对话必有用处，有坑必填。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of78226cd687b1ecdcbf5e041988192d1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"某不知名帅","author_id":"","book_id":"7366506548035603480","book_name":"说好重生当学霸，你把校花拐回家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9450人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7366507071174361624","read_count":"9450","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1129995"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"549","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,学霸,校花,单女主,搞笑轻松,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e
